subject: Fw:
body:
----- Forwarded Message ----
From: ████ ████ <█████████@hotmail.com>
To: Jeffrey Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Saturday, August 23, 2008 6:00:51 PM
Subject: 


Thank you so much Jeffrey for introducing Joe to me, he's really nice.. and thank you for the haircut! I'll send you some pictures after we come back from London.
